title: capsella hians
intro: Capsella hians, also known as Shepherds Cress, is a flowering plant in the mustard family that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Capsella hians include its ability to relieve congestion and aid in the removal of mucus, making it a natural remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Capsella hians often include infusions of the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies for enhanced effectiveness.
